item_titles: Kimi K3, and what we can still learn from the pelican benchmark
Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
Quoting Kimi K3
[AINews] Kimi K3 2.8T-A50B: the largest open model ever released; Opus 4.8-class at Sonnet 5 pricing
Kimi K3 may be an important inflection point for AI
Kimi's open model K3 nears GPT-5.6 Sol and Fable 5 while signaling the end of super cheap Chinese AI
clusters.summary: 月之暗面发布了拥有2.8万亿参数的Kimi K3开源模型，其性能接近国际顶尖水平，被视为AI领域的重要转折点。该模型在多项基准测试中表现优异，引发了广泛关注。
clusters.title: 月之暗面发布Kimi K3开源大模型

item_titles: OpenAI wants developers to stop typing commands and start using a joystick to control their AI agents
Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
Why teens deserve access to safe AI
A scorecard for the AI age
clusters.summary: OpenAI发布了衡量AI投资回报的实用记分卡，并推出了针对青少年的安全保护措施。此外，OpenAI还涉足硬件领域，发布了ChatGPT篮球周边和用于控制AI代理的Codex Micro控制器。
clusters.title: OpenAI推出AI评估标准、青少年保护及硬件产品

item_titles: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
Germany puts Google's AI Overviews and Perplexity under media law in first-of-its-kind ruling
clusters.summary: Patreon与Cloudflare合作直接屏蔽未经授权的AI爬虫，而德国媒体监管机构则裁定Google AI Overviews属于自身内容需受媒体法约束。这反映了行业对AI数据抓取和内容生成的监管趋严。
clusters.title: 平台与监管机构应对AI爬虫与内容生成

item_titles: Show HN: Hearth, an open-source local AI that runs your PC (files, apps, voice)

Show HN: I removed the LLM from my French grader – it marked correct words wrong
Show HN: Unlimited Remove Background and AI Uplscale Image and Pdf Tool Kit
Show HN: Velora – On-device macOS dictation (Whisper and a local LLM, no cloud)
clusters.summary: Hacker News社区开发者展示了多款基于本地运行的开源AI工具，涵盖AI代理共享内存、本地文件与语音控制、图像处理及离线听写等多个应用场景。
clusters.title: HN社区分享：多款本地优先与实用AI工具

item_titles: SpaceX Post-Listing Collapse Threatens IPO Market's AI Euphoria
Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal
clusters.summary: 一笔4亿美元的芯片抵押贷款标志着AI基础设施投资正向推理芯片转移。同时，SpaceX上市后的表现疲软引发了市场对AI领域IPO热潮能否持续的担忧。
clusters.title: AI基础设施投资与金融市场动态

item_titles: Linus Torvalds tells AI critics in the Linux kernel community to fork off
Two LLM-assisted memory-management patch sets
clusters.summary: Linus Torvalds明确表态支持在Linux内核开发中使用AI工具，并反驳了社区内的反对声音。同时，社区也提交了由LLM辅助的内存管理补丁集。
clusters.title: Linus Torvalds支持在Linux内核开发中使用AI

item_titles: Connect more of your apps to Search
Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
Google rebrands NotebookLM as Gemini Notebook and opens its search app to third-party integration
clusters.summary: Google将NotebookLM更名为Gemini Notebook并深化生态整合，同时扩展了AI Mode的功能，允许用户连接并操作第三方应用以完成复杂任务。
clusters.title: Google重塑AI搜索与笔记应用生态

item_titles: Introspection Fine-Tuning (IFT): Training Small LLMs to Introspect
MAPS: Modeling Co-Existing Subjective Perspectives and Shared Meaning in Multi-Agent Cognitive Dialogue
Token Time Continuous Diffusion for Language Modeling
ReasFlow: Assisting Reasoning-Centric Scientific Discovery in Applied Mathematics via a Knowledge-Based Multi-Agent System
AI Agents Do Not Fail Alone:The Context Fails First
Quantum Compositional NLP for Arabic: Grammar, Morphology, and Word Sense in Circuit Topology
clusters.summary: 最新学术研究涵盖了小型语言模型内省微调、连续扩散语言建模、多智能体认知对话建模，以及利用知识图谱增强推理等多个前沿方向。
clusters.title: arXonAI最新论文：从内省微调到多智能体认知对话

item_titles: 从仰望星空到落地创新：WAIC青年菁英会即将硬核开场，最新成果首发在即
逛完WAIC 2026我悟了：国产AI芯片的真对手，根本不是英伟达的GPU

WAIC直击 | 十大开源社区「挤」进了一家GPU展台，沐曦凭什么？
上海制造，AI入魂：央国企率先“重用”大模型，自动化设备被换下
达卯科技WAIC首发算电协同2.0：构筑AI算力与绿色能源融合新范式
clusters.summary: WAIC 2026大会聚焦国产AI芯片竞争、算力与绿色能源协同以及大模型在制造和民生领域的落地应用。多家企业发布了最新的软硬件创新成果与Agent解决方案。
clusters.title: WAIC 2026：国产AI芯片、算电协同与智能体落地

item_titles: 给AI发工号、定岗位、做绩效，数字员工终于能落地了
clusters.summary: 面壁智能开源了StaffDeck平台，该平台旨在通过为AI分配工号、岗位和绩效考核，推动数字员工的实际落地应用。
clusters.title: 面壁智能开源数字员工平台StaffDeck

item_titles: Tkngate Zero-trust P2P ateway for LLM agents (open source, written in Go)
Show HN: ReasonGate- An explainable gate that blocks LLM prompt injection
clusters.summary: 开发者推出了多款开源工具以增强AI代理的安全性，包括基于零信任的P2P网关Tkngate和可解释的提示词注入拦截器ReasonGate。这些工具旨在为大语言模型提供更可靠的安全防护。
clusters.title: 开源LLM代理安全与防护工具

item_titles: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
clusters.summary: Google为Vids应用引入了个性化AI数字人功能，用户可以使用自己的数字分身来制作和出演视频。该功能结合了Gemini Omni技术，支持通过提示词生成和编辑视频。
clusters.title: Google Vids推出个性化AI数字人功能

item_titles: Ask HN: How do you handle the actual situation with so much AI noises
clusters.summary: 开发者在Hacker News上求助，探讨在当前充斥着AI噪音的互联网环境中如何有效地推广自己的项目。
clusters.title: 讨论：如何在AI噪音中推广项目

item_titles: Gen Z is pushing back against AI – a reminder that the future isn't written
Anthropic Thinks Its Own Success Is Key to Making AI Safe
Some Thoughts on AI and Art
clusters.summary: Anthropic强调其在AI安全中的主导作用，而Z世代对AI的抵触情绪以及对AI与艺术关系的探讨，凸显了公众对AI技术社会影响的深层思考。
clusters.title: 社会与伦理视角下的AI发展反思
